titleStmt.title: SII 17.456: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 456. (A.R. No. 425 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
This inscription begins with the praśasti Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc., of the king.
It seems to refer to a gift of perpetual lamp by Āriyaṉ Uḍaiyāḷar alias Śembikulamāṇikka-kkūttar to the god Tirumaṟaikkāḍu Uḍaiyār, in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu in Dīnachintā. maṇi-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Uri
maiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalar ciṅkaḷar melaka
ṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittum taṉ cakkaram naṭātti virasimhācaṉattu Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟi
runtaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravatti śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu—
2 10 3 Āvatu Uṭaiyār Āriyaṉ Uṭaiyāḷarāṉa cempi(k)kulamāṇikkakkūttar tiṉacintāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu kunṟūr
nāṭṭu tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku tiruviḷakku neyyaṭṭum Iṭaiyaril Accan kaḻaniyāṉa tiruvoṟṟiyūrkkonum cāṉi
tirucciṟṟampa cemakkoṉum kāmi nāṉa Umpaḷanāṭṭuk koṉum ĀṇLines 8 to 12 are very badly mutilated.
Digital edition of SII 17.456 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
